/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libouster_msgs__python.so -o rosidl_generator_py/ouster_msgs/libouster_msgs__python.so CMakeFiles/ouster_msgs__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/ouster_msgs/msg/_packet_msg_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jetson/ros-workspace/build/ouster_msgs:/opt/ros/foxy/lib libouster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libouster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
